form.title: Data Privacy Terms
form.description: We collect some cookies and access data so that the website can help you find products, services and offers that suit you. In addition, it also helps us measure operational efficiency, optimize user experience and advertising.
form.agreement: By selecting "Continue", you agree to allow us to process data according to the <link>purposes and terms</link> of the website.

termsModal.description: By selecting "Continue", you agree to allow us to process data according to the purposes and terms of the website.
